script: echo '=== Look up Jose Sotillo ==='; az ad user list --filter "startswith(givenName,'Jose')" --query "[].{id:id, displayName:displayName, upn:userPrincipalName, mail:mail}" -o json 2>&1; echo; echo '=== Search by displayName containing Sotillo ==='; az ad user list --filter "startswith(surname,'Sotillo')" --query "[].{id:id, displayName:displayName, upn:userPrincipalName, mail:mail}" -o json 2>&1
